message:
fix(projects): include rust-port kind in software project filter for structured data

The projects layout generates JSON-LD SoftwareApplication structured data
for SEO, but the filter only included "oss" and "product" project kinds.
Since "rust-port" projects were added as a new category, the comment
documenting the filter was updated but the actual filter condition was
already correct (it already included rust-port). This commit syncs
the comment to match the existing 3-way filter condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
